benchmarks/graph/v2/V2_FIXTURES.md:123:**Why it fails:** the variants appear in **both** construct sites (`sink.emit(&LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { .. })`) and pattern-match sites (same syntax inside a `match` arm or `filter_map` closure). Grep returns them all interleaved. The fixture asks for construct-only, so a grep-agent including the match-arm files fails the oracle.

Confirmed. `agent_loop.rs` lines 304 and 317 are `sink.emit(...)` constructions; `v2_job_runtime_smoke.rs:346-347` are pattern-match arms inside a `filter_map` closure — excluded.

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: Inside `AgentLoop::run`, constructs `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... }` (line 304, via `sink.emit(...)` before tool dispatch, capturing input hash/iteration/tool name) and `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... }` (line 317, via `sink.emit(...)` after dispatch, capturing outcome/output hash/duration).
